name: Opportunity Solution Tree (OST)
what_it_is: A visual framework connecting desired outcomes to user problems to solution ideas to experiments in a structured hierarchy.
core_mechanic: Start from one outcome. Branch into opportunity spaces. Branch from opportunities into solutions. Design experiments. Forces problem-first thinking.
when_to_use: Clear outcome metric but too many competing solution ideas / Team keeps jumping to solutions before problems are mapped / Need to prioritize problem spaces not features
when_not_to_use: No defined outcome yet (go to North Star first) / Time-constrained execution sprint / Problem space already narrowed and validated
ideaos_application: Agent 3 builds three levels - outcome, top 3 opportunity spaces, 2 solution ideas per opportunity. Forces validation you're working on the right opportunity.
